summary: All-round 3-strut Delta-Bow kite that is the best-selling Duotone kite. Balanced freeride performance with good hangtime, easy relaunch and wide range of use across disciplines. Also available in Evo SLS and Evo D/LAB constructions.
Dedicated wave/surf kite with instant drift, quick turning and reliable depower. Available in Neo, Neo SLS and flagship Neo D/LAB (Aluula) editions used by the Duotone wave team.

Five-strut big-air/hangtime machine. Massive lift and long floaty boosts, predictable bar feel. Available in Rebel, Rebel SLS and Rebel D/LAB (the ultimate big-air kite built with Aluula D/TX and Trinity TX materials).
Crossover freestyle/big-air kite favored for powered kiteloops and all-round progression riding. Available in Dice and Dice SLS; loved for its direct bar feel and aggressive turning.
C-shape freestyle/wakestyle kite built for unhooked handle-passes and powered pop. The choice of Duotone's freestyle athletes; currently offered as Vegas Concept Blue.
Dedicated light-wind kite with huge range and effortless low-end power. Great for foiling and big-size twintip riding in marginal wind. Also offered as the Aluula-built Juice D/LAB.
Single-strut beginner and school kite. Easy water relaunch, forgiving power delivery and stable drift for learning the basics safely.
High-performance freeride/big-air twintip with comfortable flex, early planing and confident edge hold. Available in Select, Select SLS and Select Concept Blue constructions.
The iconic Duotone freeride twintip offering a smooth, forgiving ride and all-round freestyle capability. Offered as Jaime SLS and Jaime Concept Blue.
Women's-specific freeride twintip with softer flex and lower stance width for a smoother, easier ride. Available as Soleil SLS and Soleil Concept Blue.
Freestyle/wakestyle twintip with stiff flex and punchy pop for boots and handle-pass riding.
Pro-level competition twintip developed with the Duotone team riders for maximum pop, grip and high-end freestyle/big-air performance.
All-round kite surfboard for waves and strapless freestyle. Available in the lightweight Whip SLS and top-tier Whip D/LAB constructions.
Team-rider wave-focused directional with a performance shortboard shape for turns and vertical wave riding.
Compact freeride kite-foilboard designed to pair with Duotone's Spirit/Soar foils. Stable take-off platform for progressing foilers.
